title: Vera Bradley Stock Forecast May 2024
text: As of May 2024, Vera Bradley's current price target was $10.00. The stock price of VRA at that time reflected significant headwinds from poor earnings performance and channel challenges. Market observers noted that Vera Bradley's stock price had declined substantially from prior year levels reflecting the company's operational challenges. Analyst forecasts for VRA remained mixed with varying price targets and ratings reflecting uncertainty about the company's turnaround progress.
